description: Stand shoulder-width, push hips back and down, keep chest up and return with control.
Hold a dumbbell at chest and squat keeping torso upright to load quads and glutes.
Hinge at hips with slight knee bend, lower weight along legs, keep a neutral spine and drive hips forward.
Lie on back, drive through heels to lift hips until torso aligns, squeeze glutes at top.
Upper back on bench, drive hips upward while pausing and squeezing glutes at top.
From plank lower chest to floor keeping elbows tucked slightly, then press up maintaining core tight.
Hands elevated to reduce load — good progression for chest strength with less shoulder strain.
Press dumbbells from chest to full extension while controlling scapula and range.
Pull handle to torso while squeezing shoulder blades; keep chest up and neutral spine.
Pull bar to upper chest with controlled motion avoiding shrugging at top.
Use assistance to perform pull-ups focusing on scapular depression and slow negatives.
Press dumbbells overhead while keeping core braced and avoiding excessive arching.
Raise dumbbells to side with slight elbow bend to target lateral delts; use light weight.
Pull rope to face height to strengthen rear delts and improve shoulder health.
Hold straight-body on forearms and toes, brace core and avoid sagging in lumbar spine.
Lie on back and alternate extending opposite arm and leg while keeping lower back neutral.
From all fours extend opposite arm and leg while keeping hips stable to train core and lumbar control.
Take controlled steps into deep lunges, keeping knee tracking over toes and torso upright.
Step onto a stable box and drive through the front heel to stand tall; controlled descent.
Rise onto toes, pause at top and lower with control to build calf strength.
Curl weight toward shoulders without swinging, then lower under control.
Press rope down by extending elbows while keeping upper arms stationary.
With band around knees step sideways to load glute medius and improve hip stability.
Hinge on one leg while reaching the weight down keeping a flat back to load hamstrings and balance.
Machine press with guided path for safe pressing pattern and less stabilizer demand.
Press from an incline bench to target upper chest with controlled tempo.
Isolated quad movement using machine to control range and load.
Controlled back extensions to strengthen lower back; avoid if symptomatic.
Hold weights and walk with upright posture to build grip, core and posture.
From plank bring knees alternately toward chest at a controlled pace for core and conditioning.
Hold band and pull apart to strengthen scapular retractors and shoulder health.
